name: Resume Ranking Module - API Collection
description: Complete API collection for testing the AI-powered Resume Ranking Module

requests.name: 1. Analyze Resume
requests.tests:
pm.test('Status code is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Analysis successful', () => pm.response.json().success === true);

requests.name: 2. Get Analysis Results
requests.tests:
pm.test('Status code is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Has score', () => pm.response.json().data.score !== undefined);

requests.name: 3. Get Detailed Analysis
4. Get Analysis Status
requests.tests:
pm.test('Status code is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Has status', () => pm.response.json().data.status !== undefined);

requests.name: 5. Get Top Candidates
requests.tests:
pm.test('Status code is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Has candidates array', () => Array.isArray(pm.response.json().data.candidates));

requests.name: 6. Get Job Statistics
requests.tests:
pm.test('Status code is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Has statistics', () => pm.response.json().data.totalAnalyzed !== undefined);

requests.name: 8. Batch Analyze
requests.tests:
pm.test('Status code is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Has results', () => pm.response.json().data.results !== undefined);
